text: This is a **problematic** sc-Nanopore demo (baseline direct-ligation protocol). QC flagged **25.7%** of reads as **TSO concatemers** (internal template-switch-oligo copies where two cDNAs are chained through tandem TSOs) — **overall FAIL**. Baseline fix: split reads at internal TSO junctions (computational). To deplete them at the bench, switch to the optional enriched profile (biotinylated-primer streptavidin pull-down, ONT SST_9198), which the baseline prep omits. Eval vs ground truth: recall 0.87, F1 0.93.
